AUTH_INVALID_TOKEN: Your session is invalid or has expired. Please sign in again.
AUTH_EMAIL_IN_USE: An account with this email already exists
AUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
AUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
AUTH_CSRF_FAILED: Security check failed. Please refresh and try again.
AUTH_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.
USER_SUPERVISOR_INVALID_ROLE: The assigned supervisor must be a Supervisor or Financial Admin
ACCOUNT_NUMBER_DUPLICATE: This account number is already in use for this supervisor
ACCOUNT_NOT_SUPERVISOR_ROLE: The selected user is not a supervisor
ACCOUNT_OWN_ONLY: You can only view your own accounts
REQUEST_OWNER_ONLY_EDIT: Only the request owner can edit it
REQUEST_WRONG_STATUS_EDIT: Cannot edit a request with status: {{status}}
REQUEST_WRONG_STATUS_DELETE: Cannot delete a request with status: {{status}}
REQUEST_WRONG_STATUS_SUBMIT: Cannot submit a request with status: {{status}}
REQUEST_WRONG_STATUS_REVISE: Cannot revise a request with status: {{status}}
TRAVEL_DETAILS_REQUIRED: Travel details are required before submission
LINKED_ADVANCE_MISSING: The linked travel advance does not exist
LINKED_ADVANCE_NOT_OWNED: The linked travel advance does not belong to you
LINKED_ADVANCE_WRONG_TYPE: The linked request is not a travel advance
LINKED_ADVANCE_NOT_PAID: The linked travel advance must be paid
APPROVAL_WRONG_SUPERVISOR: This request is assigned to a different supervisor
APPROVAL_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: Account not found for this supervisor
APPROVAL_ALREADY_APPROVED: You have already approved this request
APPROVAL_ITEMS_NOT_CLASSIFIED: All items must be classified with a code secondaire before final approval
APPROVAL_PAID_WRONG_STATUS: Cannot mark paid a request with status: {{status}}
CLASSIFICATION_WRONG_STATUS: Cannot classify items on a request with status: {{status}}
DOCUMENT_OWNER_ONLY_UPLOAD: Only the request owner can upload documents
DOCUMENT_OWNER_ONLY_DELETE: Only the request owner can delete documents
DOCUMENT_REQUEST_WRONG_STATUS: Cannot upload documents to a request with status: {{status}}
DOCUMENT_FILE_TOO_LARGE: File exceeds the maximum size of {{maxMb}} MB
DOCUMENT_ITEM_MISMATCH: Item does not belong to this request
